3307130.name: Shadows At Bay
3307130.description:
This is a first-person horror game. You are trapped in a hedge maze at night with a ghost.

Luckily, the creature is afraid of light and can be harmed by it.

Unluckily, there are only voice activated street lamps in the maze, and you have no other light sources.

To escape, you'll need to explore the labyrinth, collect keys, and find the way out—all while using the voice-activated lamps as your only weapons.

[Feature]

The game captures your microphone audio volume, so shout loudly to control the lights and protect yourself.

Don't worry if you don’t have a microphone; there will be a control to make noise in the game.

[Playtime]

It will be a short horror experience lasting 20-40 minutes.
